title: Qualifying higher plant notification (reference: 25/Q04)
body: "This document is a notice of intention to release a qualifying higher plant under schedule 3A of the Genetically Modified Organisms (Deliberate Release) (Amendment) (England) Regulations 2022.  The release will be made under a project titled ‘Field scale trials of CADENZA low asparagine QHP lines 23 (ACRYLOW Cadenza (PBO) 23) and 59 (ACRYLOW Cadenza (PBO) 59)’, starting on or after 11 March 2025.  For further information, contact the Defra GM team.  Email: gm-regulation@defra.gov.uk "
